description: On this page, you can change your email address. After submitting the change, a confirmation email will be sent to your new address — you must confirm it for the update to take effect. Make sure the provided email address is correct to avoid communication issues. Once confirmed, you’ll have the option to revert the change within 1 business day by clicking the link included in the confirmation email. After that time, the change becomes permanent.
title: Change email address
